title: Trump Signals Retreat From Goal of Regime Change in Iran
summary_full: In the first days of the U.S.-Israeli campaign against Iran, Mr. Trump pressed for a popular uprising against Tehran’s government.
summary_public: In the first days of the U.S.-Israeli campaign against Iran, Mr. Trump pressed for a popular uprising against Tehran’s government.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: goal of Regime Change in Iran
